name: Lehman College
fact: Part of CUNY. Home to the Lehman Center for the Performing Arts, one of the Bronx's premier cultural venues.

name: Comp Sci High
fact: A public high school focused on computer science, with a brand-new facility designed for the innovators of tomorrow.

name: Inspiration Point
fact: A cultural arts center inside The Peninsula, a mixed-use campus at the forefront of South Bronx revitalization.

name: Andrew Freedman Home
fact: Built in 1924, now an artist hub and community center. One of the most beautiful buildings on the Grand Concourse.

name: Mt. Saint Vincent
fact: Founded by the Sisters of Charity of New York. A university committed to ecumenism and the development of the whole person.

name: DREAM Charter HS
fact: Designed by Sir David Adjaye inside a transformed 1900s ice factory. One of NYC's most inspiring school buildings.
